title: Stimulantia
director: Hans Abramson, Hans Alfredson, Arne Arnbom
writer: Hans Abramson, Hans Alfredson, Arne Arnbom
actors: Hans Abramson, Hans Alfredson, Harriet Andersson
plot: A Swedish film in eight episodes by directors Ingmar Bergman, Vilgot Sjöman, Lars Görling, Hans Alfredson, Tage Danielsson, Hans Abramson, Jörn Donner, Arne Arnbom, Gustaf Molander.
